summary: Backend testing for e-HUFFAZ AL-AKHYAR completed. All 21 pytest cases passed (100%) covering auth, halaqahs, students, buletin CRUD, tasmi CRUD with filters, and all 7 analytics endpoints. Verified _id is never leaked, Bearer token auth is enforced, wrong password returns 401, and Google Sheets CSV student fetch works with header row 'NAMA PELAJAR' filtered out.

minor.issue: No cleanup endpoint for extra DB students; TEST_ data accumulates in extra_students collection across runs. Also no validation that 'nama' is non-empty (empty string after strip() would still be inserted).
No validation on mod/keputusan enum values - accepts any string. No validation that halaqah_id exists in HALAQAHS.

Sheet parsing heuristic takes the first non-empty cell of each row as a name. If a sheet has 'Bil' column with numbers and a name column, first cell is numeric (skipped correctly), but any short single-word non-name (e.g., '-' or numeric labels) may slip if length>=3 and contains a letter. Header 'NAMA PELAJAR' is explicitly filtered.
Uses server-local date.today() with no timezone awareness; could mismatch user expectations across TZ boundaries.

action_items: Optional: Add Pydantic enum validation for tasmi 'mod' and 'keputusan' fields to reject invalid values with 422.
Optional: Add DELETE endpoint for extra_students to support cleanup/maintenance.
Optional: Reject empty 'nama' in POST /api/halaqahs/{id}/students with 400.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated in newer FastAPI; consider lifespan handler.
SHARED_PASSWORD/SIMPLE_TOKEN have hardcoded fallback defaults in code matching .env; OK for this app but better to fail fast if missing.
No rate limiting on /api/auth/login - brute force possible against a 10-char password.
TasmiCreate accepts mod/keputusan as free strings; should use Literal/Enum for stronger contract.
fetch_students_from_sheet has process-wide in-memory cache - won't scale across workers; acceptable for single-instance MVP.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed buletin/tasmi records and cleanup at end. One extra student 'TEST_Pelajar Tambahan' may remain in extra_students for halaqah_id=haikal (no delete endpoint exists).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is solid; all endpoints work and respect auth. Google Sheets CSV fetch is live and dependent on external network. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py is pytest-compatible and self-cleaning except for extra_students (no delete API). Frontend testing was not requested.
